title: Data error when fork-join_none and automatic variables are used in loop

features.name: fork_join_none with automatic variable capture in loop
features.description: Code should include fork-join_none inside a for loop where an automatic variable captures the loop iteration value before being used in a forked process

features.name: fork_join_none in loop accessing loop variable
features.description: Code should include fork-join_none inside a for loop where the loop variable is accessed in a delayed forked process after the loop completes
